checks.item: Completeness: Merchant model preservation covered in Data Models
checks.note: Line 222: 'Retain: Merchant model remains in prisma/schema.prisma unchanged — not modified or deleted.'

checks.item: Completeness: T5 description mentions AC7 UI validation (cannot save without step+field) and confirm dialog
checks.note: T5 explicitly states 'Editor enforces AC7: save is blocked if there are no steps or any step has no fields' and 'List page includes a confirm dialog before deletion (AC10).'

checks.item: Completeness: T9 has Files to delete section listing all 6 files
checks.note: T9 lists exactly 6 files under Files to delete: create-link/route.ts, onboarding/submit/route.ts, [token]/page.tsx, [token]/OnboardingForm.tsx, merchants/route.ts, merchants/[id]/status/route.ts.

checks.item: Completeness: T7 covers null templateId case and href XSS validation
checks.note: T7 description: 'When submission.templateId is null (deleted template), show a note "Template was deleted"' and 'href must be validated to http:// or https:// only before rendering to prevent javascript: URI XSS.'
T6: 'StatsCard counts are switched from Merchant status counts to SubmissionStatus counts (NEW/IN_REVIEW/APPROVED/REJECTED).'

checks.item: Completeness: email field is nullable in Data Models Prisma schema
checks.note: Data Models schema shows: 'email String? // nullable: extracted from first EMAIL field if present'
Decision 11 fully explains: email is String?, extracted from first EMAIL-type field if present, otherwise null, with rationale and alternatives.
Decision 9: 'All admin API routes check session.user.role === "ADMIN" in addition to session existence. Return 403 if role is absent or mismatched.'
Decision 10 lists explicit limits: name/label .max(255), placeholder .max(500), value .max(10000), number z.number().finite().

checks.item: Security: SVG removed from MIME allowlist in Decision 6
checks.note: Decision 6: 'Allowed MIME types: image/jpeg, image/png, application/pdf (SVG excluded — can carry inline JS, unsafe when served directly).'

checks.item: Security: Decision 7 specifies exact middleware paths (not broad /api/templates)
checks.note: Decision 7: 'Exact public paths added... The broader /api/templates prefix must NOT be allowlisted — that would bypass auth for all admin management routes.'

checks.item: Security: T7 specifies href must be http/https only
checks.note: T7: 'href must be validated to http:// or https:// only before rendering to prevent javascript: URI XSS.'

checks.item: Security: T4 specifies email excluded from list endpoint
checks.note: T4: 'email excluded from list response (returned only in detail).'

checks.item: Security: Supabase bucket visibility marked [PENDING USER APPROVAL]
checks.note: Decision 6 ends with '→ [PENDING USER APPROVAL]' for the public vs signed URLs question.

checks.item: Mirage: T3 Files to read points to src/app/api/onboarding/submit/route.ts instead of src/lib/supabase.ts for upload pattern
checks.note: T3 Files to read includes 'src/app/api/onboarding/submit/route.ts' (the upload pattern source). Note: src/lib/supabase.ts is also still listed, but the primary upload pattern reference is correct.

checks.item: Mirage: T3 mentions src/lib/form-validation.ts, and some task explicitly owns its creation (Files to modify)
checks.note: T3 lists 'src/lib/form-validation.ts (new, created in T1 or T2)' in Files to read, but neither T1 nor T2 lists it in their Files to modify. No task formally owns creating this file — it is referenced as a dependency but has no assigned creator task.
Decision 7: 'Alternatives considered: Allowlisting /api/templates broadly...' Decision 8: 'Alternatives considered: Keeping old routes as redirects...'

checks.item: Template: T13 and T14 have 'Files to read: N/A'
checks.note: T13: 'Files to read: N/A (runs tests and checks browser)'. T14: 'Files to read: N/A'.
